---
title: "Hello"
pagetitle: "Lucas Watson"
description-meta: "Lucas Watson is a Ph.D. student at Kansas State University studying dynamic human decision-making from a behavioral and ecological perspective."
main-photo: /files/photos/profile_photo2.jpeg
main-photo-square: /files/photos/profile_photo2_square.jpeg
title-block-banner: "#cdd99a"
format:
  html:
    quarto-template-params:
      banner-header-class: "home"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-4}

```{=html}
<div class="grid" style="--bs-columns: 5; row-gap: 0;">
  <div class="g-col-1 g-col-sm-0"></div>
  <div class="g-col-3 g-col-sm-5">
    <picture>
      <source media="(max-width: 576px)" srcset="{{< meta main-photo-square >}}">
      <source media="(min-width: 576px)" srcset="{{< meta main-photo >}}">
      <img class="img-fluid" src="{{< meta main-photo >}}" alt="{{< meta author-meta >}}">
    </picture>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-1 g-col-sm-0"></div>
</div>
```

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-8}

I'm currently a third year Ph.D. student at Kansas State University studying human decision making through the lens of foraging ecology. I make and play video games to learn about human cognition. Using foraging-inspired games, I hope to enhance decision-making research by making studies more ecologically valid for researchers and engaging for participants. Through careful planning and analysis, I hope to not completely mislead myself in the process! 

:::

:::
